01

About / Profile

I'm a 3D Modeler based in Davao City, working under the handle Harben (H4RB3N) across multiple Roblox game studios and modding communities since late 2017. My focus is vehicle modeling — building assets that hold up visually while staying light enough to run well in real time.

I work primarily in Blender, mainly at low- to mid-poly, though I can handle high-poly work just fine. For cars without existing blueprints or bodykits, I use Imagemodeller and PnPoint to reconstruct accurate reference geometry from photos.

I'm currently completing a degree in Entertainment and Multimedia Computing at Mapúa Malayan Colleges Mindanao, and I supplement that coursework with self-directed training in game design and project management.

  • Role3D Vehicle Modeler
  • AliasHarben (H4RB3N)
  • Primary ToolBlender
  • Reference ToolsImagemodeller, PnPoint
